name: Divinely Decadent Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring corn syrup and butter to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat. Add chocolate chips and stir until melted. Stir in sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract.
3. Blend in flour and chopped pecans or walnuts.
4. Grease and flour a 9-inch layer cake pan. Pour the mixture into the pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove and let it cool completely on a rack.
6. To prepare the glaze, stir together chocolate chips, butter, and dark corn syrup over low heat in a saucepan. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract or milk.
7. Pour the glaze over the cooled cake and let stand for one hour.
8. Garnish with whole pecans or walnuts. Cut into wedges to serve.
